name: sulis
description: Sulis — the canonical front-door plugin for the Sulis AI marketplace. Hosts the founder-facing concierge agent + journey skills (start/handoff/status); the meta-skill methodology (add-skill) used to author other plugins; the deep-mode code-health framework (check-* tier 1-7); the address-findings bridge (turns findings into Work Packages per WORK_PACKAGE_STANDARD); and the executor + train + wpx-* CLI tools (consolidated from sulis-execution at v0.30.0). Founders interact via /sulis:* commands — including the full execution surface: /sulis:run-wp, /sulis:run-all, /sulis:retry, /sulis:wp-status, /sulis:backfill-code-review, /sulis:backfill-gates.
